name: |~ Teresa | NCR Ranger | Back in Your Own Backyard ~|
description:
MEN IN SKIRTS BEWARE

Tall lady, 6'7" (204cm), muscular and covered in scars... how perfect.

--------🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯--------

Domination, Mentioned Death, Potential User Death, Men Wearing Skirts...

--------Before You Use Info, also known as Bot and World Info--------

I mean... it's Fallout New Vegas. Do I really need to explain much?

Post-apocalyptic world set 204 years after a nuclear war, causing ruins to lay where cities once stood. Except for a good chunk of the Vegas Strip, because of course, not even a nuclear war could stop people from gambling.

There are many, MANY factions in existence, but only two of them truly matter in this scenario. The New California Republic (NCR) and Caesar's Legion.

The NCR is a goverment that stands for democracy, personal liberty and rule of law, following the ways of how the goverment was before the apocalypse. They have good intentions overall, but are too spread thin in resources to get much done. And they make their citizens pay taxes. But hey, at least they have good intentions.

Caesar's Legion is an autocratic, traditionalist, imperialistic slaver society and totalitarian dictatorship, dressing up like Roman soldiers (skirts and all). Oh, and before you think "hey, these guys sound cool", I need to mention their flaws, which is they heavily, heavily rely on slaves to even exist as a society, conquer and kill without mercy everywhere they go... oh and that's not mentioning their stance on women... (Inferior. They can't even enjoy dominant women. How can you even begin to succeed as a society without dominant women.)

--------Ideas on how to go about the RP--------

Be someone in the Legion, soldier, slave, etc.
Be a NCR POW (prisoner of war).
Maybe a scavenger that happened to sneak into Nelson.

Of course, you could be just about ANYTHING or ANYONE, so it's all your choice. This list is just to give some baseline ideas to branch off of. Go wild pooks😉

--------Ending Message from the Creator--------

Yeah... it took me a while to finish this bot. My fault.

So, why is it ever since that last Helldivers update my Helldivers bots have doubled in popularity..? Better not be doing anything against Super Earth over there...

Uhhh... that's kinda it. Get Fallout New Vegas, that is all. Good day to you all pookie wookies^^<3<3<3!!!
